summary: Block 247 Collection Completionist Flow - Valuation Wizard. All 10 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend verified after bug fix: TreasuryHeader shows 'X of Y records valued' + 'Add Missing Values' button, ValuationWizard modal opens with all required elements (progress bar, counter, album art, title, value input, Save & Next, Skip, Done for now buttons), celebration state shows when queue empty.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Double /api prefix in API calls causing 'Could not load records' error

critical_code_review_comments: valuation.py lines 400-446: GET /api/valuation/unvalued-queue correctly returns records where discogs_id exists but no collection_values entry with median_value > 0
valuation.py lines 448-495: POST /api/valuation/wizard-save/{discogs_id} saves to both community_valuations (trimmed mean) AND collection_values (so record counts as valued in summary)
ValuationWizard.js: Fixed API path from `${API}/api/valuation/...` to `${API}/valuation/...` (API variable already includes /api prefix)
CollectionPage.js line 600: TreasuryHeader shows when total_value > 0 OR total_count > valued_count
CollectionPage.js line 614: onOpenWizard prop passed to TreasuryHeader for Add Missing Values button
index.css lines 196-211: Wizard slide animations (.wizard-card.slide-out, .wizard-card.slide-in) correctly defined
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up: 1 record with discogs_id 888777 for wizard testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 247 Valuation Wizard fully verified. Fixed bug in ValuationWizard.js where API paths had double /api prefix. Backend endpoints unvalued-queue and wizard-save work correctly. Frontend wizard shows all required elements: progress bar, Record X of Y counter, album art, title/artist, Hive Benchmark (when available), value input, Save & Next, Skip, Done for now buttons. Celebration state shows 'Collection Fully Valued! The Hive thanks you.' when queue is empty.

backend_unvalued_queue.details: GET /api/valuation/unvalued-queue returns array of records without market value, each with id, discogs_id, title, artist, cover_url, year, and optional hive_average/hive_count

backend_wizard_save.details: POST /api/valuation/wizard-save/{discogs_id} saves to both community_valuations AND collection_values, returns average_value

backend_wizard_save_removes_from_queue.details: After wizard-save, the record is no longer in unvalued-queue (it now has a collection_values entry)

frontend_treasury_valued_stat.details: TreasuryHeader shows 'X of Y records valued' stat (data-testid='treasury-collection-btn')

frontend_add_missing_values_btn.details: 'Add Missing Values' button appears when total_count > valued_count (data-testid='add-missing-values-btn')

frontend_wizard_modal.details: Clicking 'Add Missing Values' opens ValuationWizard modal (data-testid='valuation-wizard-modal')

frontend_wizard_counter.details: Record counter 'Record X of Y remaining' (data-testid='wizard-counter')

frontend_wizard_hive_benchmark.details: Hive Benchmark shows when community data exists (data-testid='wizard-hive-benchmark'). Shows 'No community data yet' otherwise.

frontend_wizard_celebration.details: Celebration state shows when queue is empty (data-testid='wizard-celebration'): 'Collection Fully Valued! The Hive thanks you.'

bug_fix_applied.issue: API paths had double /api prefix (${API}/api/valuation/... instead of ${API}/valuation/...)
bug_fix_applied.resolution: Removed extra /api prefix from axios calls
bug_fix_applied.rca: The API variable from AuthContext already includes /api suffix. The ValuationWizard component was incorrectly adding another /api prefix, resulting in 404 errors.

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked for this test
